'''Jamoh Hogra''' was a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who lived around the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Fearful for his life after a raid on a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] dreadnought, Hogra spent a fortune on his [[Jamoh Hogra's battle armor|armor]], only to be [[Death/Legends|killed]] while in the bath by one of his many enemies. His [[Armor/Legends|armor]] eventually made its way to [[Eli Gand]], a [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], and his [[Jamoh Hogra's carbine|carbine rifle]] to [[Mic'tunan'jus Orgu]], a merchant in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead's]] spaceport on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
